long_form.title: The Global Race to Armageddon: Every Nuclear Weapons Test (1945-Present)
long_form.description: Witness the complete, terrifying history of nuclear weapons tests across the globe, from the very first detonation to the present day. This visualization reveals the shocking escalation and the critical moments that shaped our world, highlighting the chilling race between nations for atomic power. Explore how countries like the United States, Russia, and the United Kingdom rapidly developed their arsenals, fundamentally altering the geopolitical landscape. Data sourced from Our World in Data.

short.title: Nobody Saw Russia's Nuclear Rise Coming (1945-1962) #Shorts
short.description: In just 17 years, from 1945 to 1962, the world witnessed an unprecedented surge in nuclear weapons tests. See how Russia skyrocketed from #7 to #2, the UK from #8 to #3, and the US grew by 9500% in this chilling arms race.
